dialogue.speaker: abraham
dialogue.englishText: Let there be no strife between you and me, and between your herdsmen and my herdsmen, for we are kinsmen

dialogue.speaker: abraham
dialogue.englishText: Is not the whole land before you? Separate yourself from me. If you take the left hand, then I will go to the right, or if you take the right hand, then I will go to the left

dialogue.speaker: yhwh
dialogue.englishText: Lift up your eyes and look from the place where you are, northward and southward and eastward and westward

dialogue.speaker: yhwh
dialogue.englishText: For all the land that you see I will give to you and to your offspring forever

dialogue.speaker: yhwh
dialogue.englishText: I will make your offspring as the dust of the earth, so that if one can count the dust of the earth, your offspring also can be counted

dialogue.speaker: yhwh
dialogue.englishText: Arise, walk through the length and the breadth of the land, for I will give it to you
